case_title: CALIFORNIA CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY vs. WIGGINS, JAMES JR. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WIGGINS, JAMES JR. RAY, LYNN TERESA $1,213.55 PRINCIPAL, $128.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,341.55
